\tzpentry{ID4262}{Dipole Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4262 introduces Dipole Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$A_{dipole} = \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi} \frac{\mu \times (r - r_{cm})}{,r - r_{cm},^3}$
\]
